justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted "arrive by 9:15" as an end time for the appointment, but quickly adapted to the user's subsequent clarification about flexibility.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative times on the same day when the initial specific request was unavailable, leading to a successful booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient, only needing one clarification to understand the user's flexibility for appointment times.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the desired appointment without any issues or jargon.
